## 🔒 Security Notice

⚠️ Please do NOT report security vulnerabilities publicly.

Instead, report them via email:

📧 lexyfischer@web.de

Include:
- Description of the issue
- Steps to reproduce
- Potential impact
- Any supporting material

This issue will be closed without discussion to protect users.
